commentaries.author: Ambrose of Milan
commentaries.content: The day of the Lord comes suddenly, it says, and in an unexpected way like the pains of childbirth, which forestall all one’s efforts to hide them. - "Letter 32 (8.56.12)"

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Burnt. Black with despair, Nahum ii. 10., and Joel ii. 6.
